children.heading: Promotion of scholarly, cultural, and artistic activities; grants
children.label: a Promotion of scholarly, cultural, and artistic activities; grants

children.text: develop and carry out programs at public or private institutions for the promotion of scholarly, cultural, and artistic activities in Japan and the United States consistent with the provisions of ; andsection 2902(b) of this title
make grants to carry out such programs.

children.heading: Annual report
children.label: b Annual report
children.text: The Commission shall submit to the President and to the Congress an annual report of its activities under this chapter together with such recommendations as the Commission determines appropriate.
